featuresReviewed.correctness: Table + RLS + cascade + UNIQUE dedupe verified via 10 tests; Storage bucket policies gate per-user folder.
featuresReviewed.security: Owner-only SELECT/DELETE on table; writes service-role. Storage.objects policies scope by (storage.foldername(name))[1] = auth.uid()::text.
featuresReviewed.quality: Forward-extension added embeddings.source_type + file_id in the same migration so later features drop in cleanly.

featuresReviewed.correctness: 9-stage pipeline (auth, size, parse, ext, magic, hash, quota, dedupe, storage+counter) covered by 11 tests + 31 validate-helper tests.
featuresReviewed.security: 25MB cap, magic-byte defeat of MIME spoof, path traversal sanitization, UNIQUE constraint + 23505 race handling, rollback on storage failure.
featuresReviewed.quality: Duck-typed File detection works across jsdom/node/edge runtimes.

featuresReviewed.correctness: Dispatcher routes 7 formats; MAX_EXTRACTED_BYTES cap defends zip/PDF bomb; decodeText fallback handles non-UTF8; encrypted PDF detector ahead of parser.
featuresReviewed.security: Service-role-only processing; mammoth strips VBA macros by design.
featuresReviewed.quality: processFile single-shot orchestrator with status transitions observable via Realtime; errors route to status=failed with readable error_message.
issues: Real adversarial fixtures (zip/PDF bomb, encrypted PDF, VBA-laden DOCX, multi-format fixtures) deferred to adversarial-fixture pass.

featuresReviewed.correctness: RLS-filtered lookup + service-role cascade verified by 5 tests.
featuresReviewed.security: Cross-user id yields 404 without leaking existence.
featuresReviewed.quality: Storage.remove non-blocking so orphaned objects don't block row cleanup.

featuresReviewed.correctness: match_chunks dropped + recreated to return source_type; file chunks bypass crawl-batch gate.
featuresReviewed.quality: system-prompt renders (File: name) for file-sourced citations distinct from (Source: url).

featuresReviewed.correctness: Dropzone + file list + chip + retry + delete all wired; Realtime subscription on supplementary_files reflects status transitions live.
featuresReviewed.quality: Pure ui-status helpers unit-tested; component logic composes from the API surface.
